  const safeDocUrl = hasDocUrl ? docUrl.trim() : "";

const [sitesEulaUrl, setSitesEulaUrl] = useState("");
  const [smsOptInUrl, setSmsOptInUrl] = useState("");

Agreement documents
Optional: paste links to your official PDFs/docs. These links will show up as “Open document”.
setSitesEulaUrl(e.target.value)} placeholder="https://..." className="mt-2 w-full rounded-lg border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm" disabled={!canManage} /> {eulaDocUrl ? ( Open current EULA doc ) : null}
setSmsOptInUrl(e.target.value)} placeholder="https://..." className="mt-2 w-full rounded-lg border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-sm" disabled={!canManage} /> {smsDocUrl ? ( Open current SMS doc ) : null}
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
{/* NEW: Document links (optional) */}
Agreement documents (optional)
If you already uploaded PDFs to Document Vault, paste their URLs here so admins can open the exact documents.
EULA document URL
setEulaDocumentUrl(e.target.value)} placeholder="https://..." className="mt-2 w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm" />
SMS agreement document URL
setSmsDocumentUrl(e.target.value)} placeholder="https://..." className="mt-2 w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm" />

preservedBehaviors.description: GET returns gate response when requireCompanyUser rejects
GET returns eula_accepted and sms_consent_accepted booleans from legal_consents table
PUT returns gate response when requireCompanyUser rejects
PUT returns 400 when no consent or doc URL update is provided
PUT accepts EULA and returns success:true
Route creates company_settings table with company_id, key, value, updated_at, composite primary key
Page defines AgreementCard component with EULA and SMS agreement cards
Page checks isSuperAdmin, Admin permission level, Company Owner, and Admin role for canManage
PUT accepts legal_sites_eula_url and legal_sms_opt_in_url field names for doc URL updates
GET response includes flat legal_sites_eula_url and legal_sms_opt_in_url at top level
Route validates document URLs start with http:// or https://
Route uses ON CONFLICT...DO UPDATE for saving URLs in company_settings
Route uses DELETE FROM company_settings to clear empty URLs
Page has EULA and SMS document URL inputs and Save document links button
Page disables doc save when !canManage
GET response includes nested documents object with eula_document_url and sms_document_url
PUT response includes nested documents object
PUT accepts eula_document_url and sms_document_url field names
Page reads data?.documents?.eula_document_url and sms_document_url from server data
AgreementCard receives docUrl prop for document links
Page imports Link2 icon from lucide-react for document section
